stocks.impact_theory: Announcement of definitive all-stock merger with Korsana Biosciences backed by $380M private financing, positioning CYCN for Phase 2 trials in TRD therapy. Economic implications include boosted R&D funding amid biotech funding crunch. Market psychology: merger hype drives speculative buying in low-float biotech. Historical parallels: similar small-cap biotech mergers like CYCN's past surges on trial news. Analogies: like a rocket booster igniting a stalled spacecraft; or yeast fermenting dough into rising bread.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Merger news sparked 178% premarket surge per X sentiment (high positive posts on momentum), web news confirms financing; strong buy volume indicates sustained rally into April 2.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for +30-50% gains on continued momentum, target $6-7.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short above $5.50 if fade, potential -20% retrace.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Merger dilution, biotech volatility, low float squeeze unwind.

stocks.justification: Clear catalyst with massive % move and positive X/web sentiment.

stocks.impact_theory: $550M+ multi-year contract with top hyperscaler for 4,000-person data center hub in Texas, first occupancy Q3 2026. Implications: revenue boost to $360-370M in 2026 from data center boom. Psychology: AI infrastructure demand FOMO. Parallels: hospitality firms surging on govt contracts post-COVID. Analogies: plugging into a power grid during blackout; or building a bridge to a gold mine.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Contract news directly lifts 2026 guidance; X and web highlight hyperscaler tie-up, sentiment shift from neutral to euphoric.

potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short post-hype at $13.50, -15% risk.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Execution delays, capex overruns, hyperscaler dependency.

stocks.justification: Tangible revenue contract with raised guidance.

stocks.impact_theory: Q4 FY2026 earnings beat: exceeded guidance, ACV $602M +17% YoY, 112% retention; $100M share repurchase. Implications: SaaS growth in banking amid digital shift. Psychology: beat + buyback signals confidence. Parallels: fintech beats like SQ post-earnings. Analogies: refueling a jet mid-flight; upgrading engine for supersonic speed.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings crush per web, strong forward metrics; X chatter positive on growth.

stocks.justification: Solid beat but fintech sector volatility.

stocks.impact_theory: Q4/FY2025 results: revenue +11% to $187M, swung to profit $2.3M. Implications: growth in assets under mgmt amid market rally. Psychology: profitability turnaround excites. Parallels: small finance firms post-earnings pops. Analogies: turning ship from sinking to sailing; planting seeds in fertile soil.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings surprise drove 59% after-hours surge; positive web/X coverage.

stocks.justification: Strong results but small cap risks.

stocks.impact_theory: Record prelim 2025 revenue $99.1M, new CRO for Valour subsidiary. Implications: crypto ETP growth amid bull market. Psychology: revenue record FOMO. Parallels: crypto firms like COIN on inflows. Analogies: striking oil in backyard; wave riding tsunami.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Revenue beat and leadership add; X momentum posts bullish.
